title: lec fails for picorv32 with different algorithms
body:
I think there's an issue in Yosys either with synthesis or equivalence algorithms. I synthesized picorv32 CPU with Yosys and tried to immediately verify output verilog netlist against input RTL. 

I tried direct equiv_* methods and SAT based algorithms. All fail for different reasons, check my code for details: https://github.com/Neurodyne/yosys_lec

To reproduce:
1. Synthesize with yosys syn.ys
2. Run direct lec with: yosys lec0.ys
3. Run sat based algos with yosys lec1.ys and yosys lec2.ys

(1) yields in miscompares and (2) and (3) fail to read inputs. Both cases require attention. Either to improve my scripts or to fix yosys bugs
